name: Video River Networks, Inc.
business: Video River Networks, Inc. is a technology holding firm that plans to operate and manage a portfolio of Electric Vehicles, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Robotics assets, businesses and operations in North America. It also intends to focus on Power Controls, Battery Technology, Wireless Technology, and Residential utility meters and remote mission-critical devices. As of December 31, 2024, the company generated zero revenue and had no W-2 employees.

exposures.sentence: The Company s current and target portfolio businesses and assets include operations that design, develop, manufacture and sell high-performance fully electric vehicles.
The Company s current and target portfolio businesses and assets include ... Battery Technology ...
... mostly engineered through Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Robotic technologies.
... mostly engineered through Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning and Robotic technologies.
The Company s Power Controls Division has used wireless technology to control both residential utility meters and remote, mission-critical devices since 2002.
